fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the financial report KPI web service.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the financial report KPI data is based on.

fields.name: Closed Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the fiscal year is closed.

fields.name: Account Schedule Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the row definition that the KPI web service is based on.

fields.name: KPI Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the financial report KPI web service.

fields.name: KPI Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name that will be shown on the KPI as a user-friendly name for the financial report values.

fields.name: Net Change Actual
fields.tooltip: Specifies changes in the actual general ledger amount, for closed accounting periods, up until the date in the Date field.

fields.name: Balance at Date Actual
fields.tooltip: Specifies the actual general ledger balance, based on closed accounting periods, on the date in the Date field.

fields.name: Net Change Budget
fields.tooltip: Specifies changes in the budgeted general ledger amount, based on the general ledger budget, up until the date in the Date field.

fields.name: Balance at Date Budget
fields.tooltip: Specifies the budgeted general ledger balance, based on the general ledger budget, on the date in the Date field.

fields.name: Net Change Actual Last Year
fields.tooltip: Specifies actual changes in the general ledger amount, based on closed accounting periods, through the previous accounting year.

fields.name: Balance at Date Act. Last Year
fields.tooltip: Specifies the actual general ledger balance, based on closed accounting periods, on the date in the Date field in the previous accounting year.

fields.name: Net Change Budget Last Year
fields.tooltip: Specifies budgeted changes in the general ledger amount, up until the date in the Date field in the previous year.

fields.name: Balance at Date Bud. Last Year
fields.tooltip: Specifies the budgeted general ledger balance, based on the general ledger budget, on the date in the Date field in the previous accounting year.

fields.name: Net Change Forecast
fields.tooltip: Specifies forecasted changes in the general ledger amount, based on open accounting periods, up until the date in the Date field.

fields.name: Balance at Date Forecast
fields.tooltip: Specifies the forecasted general ledger balance, based on open accounting periods, on the date in the Date field.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.
